name: contorium
description: Contorium: AI Project Intelligence Layer — preserve and retrieve project cognition across Codex sessions via MCP.

interface.shortDescription: AI Project Intelligence Layer for Codex
interface.longDescription: Contorium captures, structures, and preserves project intelligence (STATE, INTENT, DECISION, WHY) locally. Query via MCP inspect tools — Contorium records intelligence; it does not decide for the project.
defaultPrompt: Recall my workspace focus and active files.
Store a design decision in Contorium memory.
Summarize Git and session context before we continue.
